name: Mars Polar Lander

description: Mars Polar Lander is a planetary lander built by Lockheed Martin in USA. Lost on landing; drove faster-better-cheaper review. Flew in 1999 but failed; informs the redemption-arc layer of the shuttle and mir epoch.
